title: RegexMapper.java - Regular Expression Extraction Mapper
description: RegexMapper.java is a Hadoop Mapper implementation that extracts text matching a regular expression from input data. It compiles a pattern from configuration settings and finds matches in input text. The map function processes each input key-value pair, finds matches, and writes matched groups as new key-value pairs to the context. Inputs include a key of type K, a value of type Text, and a Context object. Outputs are new key-value pairs with matched text as keys and LongWritable values of 1. Dependencies include Hadoop core classes and Java's io and util-regex packages for handling input/output and regular expressions respectively.

TITLE: RegexMapper.java - Regular Expression Extraction Mapper

DESCRIPTION:
RegexMapper.java is a Hadoop Mapper implementation that extracts text matching a regular expression from input data. It compiles a pattern from configuration settings and finds matches in input text. The map function processes each input key-value pair, finds matches, and writes matched groups as new key-value pairs to the context. Inputs include a key of type K, a value of type Text, and a Context object. Outputs are new key-value pairs with matched text as keys and LongWritable values of 1. Dependencies include Hadoop core classes and Java's io and util-regex packages for handling input/output and regular expressions respectively.
